methodology.effective_value: raw × uptime; conditional bonuses are discounted (lowhp=0.30, ambush=duration/cooldown, per_stack=0.5×MaxStacks, etc.)
methodology.sparse_handling: tiers with 1 sample are extrapolated using the per-stat (or global) tier-to-tier ratio; flagged with derivation: extrapolated_from_neighbor
